evidence_records.raw_value: State Department daily briefing: 'Discussions with Ukraine on mineral cooperation are progressing, but we have nothing to announce at this time regarding any finalized agreement.'
evidence_records.notes: Primary resolution source. Language is forward-looking ('progressing') but no confirmation.

evidence_records.raw_value: Reuters: 'White House characterizes rare earth talks as a framework agreement in principle, but no signed document has been produced. Ukrainian side has not confirmed.'
evidence_records.notes: 'Framework in principle' ≠ signed deal per market rules.

evidence_records.raw_value: AP: 'Zelenskyy office reiterates that no deal involving rare earth elements has been signed. Characterizes media reports as premature.'
evidence_records.notes: Consistent with Ukraine MFA position — no deal.

evidence_records.raw_value: Polymarket YES token surged from $0.09 to $0.92 in past 24h. On-chain analysis: single address accumulated $2.1M in YES tokens. UMA dispute cycle initiated.
evidence_records.notes: ANOMALOUS price movement. No corresponding news catalyst. Suspected coordinated accumulation before UMA vote.
